name: MicroSStep
short_description: "MicroSStep" is a 2D action roguelite. Control "Cross," a two-sworded girl who becomes infinitely stronger as she fights her way through demons. Create the strongest swordsman by combining the items and skills you acquire as you level up and clear stages.
detailed_description:
Two swords girl is a warriors! Rogue Light Action Game!

There are two main characters in this game (plus one more in Time Release)!
Control the unique girls as you advance through the stages and take on the boss lurking at the deepest level.
The key to clearing the stage is to strengthen your skills and obtain items by leveling up and clearing stages along the way!

Cross: A two-sworded girl with two swords, "Kon" which has the ability to move at a moment's notice, and "Sei", which has shooting ability.
Akaho: She moves using explosions and can shoot powerful skills in "Bakunori" mode when moving at high speed.
Shirona: (Time-released character! You can't play yet!)

Heartwarming story with an emphasis on groove, colored with cutscenes!

The story is enlivened by cutscenes with dots and 3D backgrounds.
Please enjoy the dialogue between Cross and her merry companions!

Beautifully scattered! A realistic performance of being hit!

When heroines HP reaches 0, unfortunately, they dies....
However, you can see various cute and pitiful animations depending on the factor.
It is also a great way to be healed by watching girls scatter!

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
